pr.title: Non-record: Stable Growing Recurrence, Progressive Depth + Error Feedback (1.1163 BPB)

output.summary: Progressive 1→2→3 recurrence passes with contractive residual scaling, error feedback, and Jacobian proxy regularization to keep recurrence practical under 600s/16MB limits.
techniques: Progressive recurrence pass schedule (1→2→3) to trade off capacity and step time
Per-pass learnable residual scaling with low-rank error feedback to stabilize shared layers
Jacobian-proxy loss to enforce contractive dynamics across recurrence
